For FUSE, 
1. Download the latest stable version 2.9.3
2. Install
#./configure
#make
#make install 

3. Install Python binding
#sudo apt-get install fusepy

For LoggedFS,

1. Compile the code
#make

Notes to fix errors in the compilation
1.1. Missing <pcre.h>
#sudo apt-get install libpcre3-dev

1.2. Missing <libxml/parser.h>
#sudo apt-get install libxml2-dev

1.3. Missing <rlog/rlog.h>
#sudo apt-get install librlog-dev
